title: I built the "Duolingo for Trading". Just hit #1 on a local sub yesterday (35k views). Now opening the Global Waitlist! 🦈🚀
author: EffortIntelligent128
selftext:
Hey guys,

I’m a solo developer and I was frustrated with "YouTube University" and dry textbooks. So I built **BullsEye Academy** to make learning trading actually fun.

**Features:**

* **Gamified Path:** 150+ interactive lessons.
* **Boss Fights:** No guessing allowed.
* **The Arena:** Practice on real market history without risking rent money.

**Status:**  
I shared this with a local community yesterday and it went viral (#1 trending). I realized people are starving for a better way to learn this stuff.

**Waitlist is 0€ (FREE).** First 100 "Early Sharks" get a Lifetime VIP deal for 9.99€ (price of a pizza).

Let's kill the "wall of text" era together. What do you think? 🎯

comments.author: EffortIntelligent128
comments.body: Hey guys! Here's the link: [https://rares1212-dev.github.io/bullseye-academy1/](https://rares1212-dev.github.io/bullseye-academy1/) Would appreciate any joins! Thanks!
